response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep exposure to cloud platforms and agentic workflows, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal AI/CS advanced degrees — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and distributed systems experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and high-throughput services
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions; most roles are general software engineering
Missing explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques
No advanced degree in AI/CS; bachelor's is the only formal credential listed
